Off Calendar Jul-13-2020 Continued To Aug-17-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt appeared by telephone for Richard Murphy (Executor).

Mr. Huysentruyt stated that the accounting is significantly completed and that he anticipates having it filed by the end of the week. Status on close of estate is continued to August 17, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy. K. Cabasares. Not reported.
